'''Raan Stasheff''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who served as the bodyguard of [[Sayer Mon Neela]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His grandfather had served in [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] and his father had served in the Alliance since the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. When Neela [[Evacuation of Horob|escaped]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] capture aboard the ''[[Imperial Hazard]]'', Stasheff took a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot intended for Neela, but recovered at the Alliance base on [[Carosi XII]].<ref name="TCoIH" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|The Capture of Imperial Hazard|The Capture of ''Imperial Hazard''|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
